recommendation.rationale: Cleanest robustness profile: +$5,821 portfolio over 180d/8sym, no symbol regressed > $104, all 5 WF folds positive, WF avg PF 3.92, DD reduced 21%. Filter rejects ~5-10% marginal counter-VWAP entries.
caveats: XAUUSD/XAGUSD/BTCUSD/USDJPY/NAS100.r/JPN225ft H1 caches only have 20-29 days; re-validate before live deploy.
ind['vwap'] is a 20-bar rolling VWAP proxy already in the scorer, not a session-VWAP.
rejected_variants: vwap_*_boost (PnL gains but GBPUSD flips negative; robustness fail)
